title: ApprovalArtifactV1
description: Signed attestation that a *human* reviewer approved a specific action. Verified by /v1-evaluate before issuing a permit_token; the calling agent cannot self-declare authority by passing reviewer flags in `context`. Wire-stable as `approval_artifact.v1` — breaking changes must bump the `version` discriminator and live alongside v1.

tenant_id.description: Tenant / organization the approval applies to. Must match the request tenant.

action_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical action payload (action_type + actor_id + resource_id + amount + context). Binds the approval to *this* action — a reused approval for a different action is rejected.

principal_kind.description: Verifier requires 'human'. The other variants exist so the schema can describe declined approvals (e.g. an agent attempted to self-approve).

nonce.description: Single-use replay-protection token. The verifier records the nonce on first use and rejects any subsequent artifact carrying the same value.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonical artifact bytes with the `signature` field stripped. Algorithm is identified by issuer.kid in the trusted-issuer config (HS256 hex or Ed25519 hex/base64url).
